task: I need to send a quick note to my supervisor about a schedule change before the shift starts. Can you help me put together a short message that covers the basics and is easy to send?

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a short, clean version you can send:

**Hi [Supervisor Name], I wanted to let you know about a schedule change before my shift starts. I’m no longer able to make my original time and wanted to check in as soon as possible. Please let me know what you’d like me to do. Thanks.**

If you want, I can also make it:
- more casual
- more professional
- shorter/text-message style

user_simulator.text:
Yeah, that’s fine, but make it a little more direct. I’d want something I can text fast, like: 

Hi [Supervisor Name], I need to let you know my schedule changed and I won’t be able to make my original shift time. Sorry for the short notice. Please let me know if you want me to come in at a different time.

That kind of thing. Short and plain.

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a shorter, more direct version:

**Hi [Supervisor Name], my schedule changed and I won’t be able to make my original shift time. Sorry for the short notice. Let me know if you want me to come in at a different time.**

If you want, I can make it even shorter.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Short and plain, just like I wanted.
